subcodes.first_line: Lo, thy letter hath come before Us in this Prison, and We have perceived the fragrance of thy love and recognized thy sincerity in God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد حضر بین یدینا کتابک فی هذا السجن و وجدنا نفحات حبک و عرفنا خلوصک فی الله
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual transformation, @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
